prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约388名→484名→601名→2311名→1704名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年因陕西省首次新高考改革过渡出现较大位次后移（2311名），2 025年恢复至1704名，近两年波动幅度约600名。2025年基准位次约1704名；该校在陕西省理科/物理类招生计划持续增长：2021年3人→2022年11人→2023年12人→2 024年14人→2025年15人→2026年17人，连续六年扩招，2026年较2025年增加2人，扩招约13.3%，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院隶属于 上海交通大学（985/211/双一流），软科中国大学主榜排名第4位（2026年），属全国顶尖层次，医药类院校中仅次于北京协和医学院。学校层次对考生吸引力极强；临床医学（A+）、口腔医学（A+）、生物学（A+）、护理学（A-）等学科均为全国顶尖水平，与招生专 业（临床医学八年制、临床医学五年制、口腔医学5+3一体化）高度匹配，学科实力对高分考生有强吸引力；2026年上海交通大学声誉评价为偏负面（主要涉及学校管理、学术不端等事件），但医学院作为独立招生单位受影响有限；历史投档异常 记录中未见上海交通大学医学院在陕西有明显断档信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高热，口腔医学亦为推荐专业；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206,500人，较2025年172,468人增加约19.7%，竞争显著加剧；上海交通大学医学院位于上海市，属一线城市，地域吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次1704名、2026年扩招2人（扩幅约13.3%）、陕西省物理类考生大幅增加约19.7%以及临床医学/口腔医学专业持续高热等因素，扩招缓解效应不及考生增量带来的竞争压力，预计 2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约1810名，区间1593–2027名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他低分专业（该校在陕西仅招上述三个专业，均为高分段专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在陕西招生专业均为医学核心专业，无冷门专业。位次在预测区间（1593–2027名）内建议以临床医学五年制为主攻方向、临床医学八年制为冲刺、口腔医学 5+3一体化作为平行选择；位次明显优于区间下限（<1593名）可重点冲刺临床医学八年制本博连读。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 388 → 484 → 601 → 2311 → 1704, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, due to the first new college entrance examination reform transition in Shaanxi Province, there was a significant backward shift in ranking (2311), which recovered to 1704 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 600 places in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1704; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics categories in Shaanxi has been continuously increasing: 3 in 2021 → 11 in 2022 → 12 in 2023 → 14 in 2024 → 15 in 2025 → 17 in 2026, with six consecutive years of expansion. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an increase of 2 students, an expansion of about 13.3%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (985/211/Double First-Class), ranking 4th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier nationally, second only to Peking Union Medical College among medical institutions. The school's level strongly attracts high-scoring candidates; disciplines such as Clinical Medicine (A+), Stomatology (A+), Biology (A+), and Nursing (A-) are all at the national top level, highly matching the enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program, Stomatology 5+3 Integrated Program). The academic strength strongly attracts high-scoring candidates; in 2026, Shanghai Jiao Tong University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly involving school management, academic misconduct, etc.), but the School of Medicine, as an independent enrollment unit, is less affected. Historical abnormal admission records show no significant gap signals for Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine in Shaanxi.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine remains highly popular, and Stomatology is also a recommended major; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 1704 in 2025, an enrollment expansion of 2 students in 2026 (expansion rate of about 13.3%), a significant increase of about 19.7% in physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province, and the sustained high popularity of Clinical Medicine and Stomatology majors, the alleviation effect of expansion is insufficient to offset the competitive pressure from the increase in candidates. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1810, with a range of 1593–2027.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently (the school only offers the above three majors in Shaanxi, all high-score majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: All majors offered by Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine in Shaanxi are core medical majors, with no unpopular ones. For rankings within the predicted range (1593–2027), it is recommended to focus on Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program as the main target, Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program as a reach, and Stomatology 5+3 Integrated Program as a parallel choice; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1593), one can focus on reaching for the Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Bachelor-Doctor Continuous Program.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
